channel.title: Wales on The Guyana Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Wales on The Guyana Brief

item.title: Guyana Daily Brief – Wednesday, April 8, 2026
item.description: Guyana pockets US$761M in oil revenue, denies secret payout to gas contractor, and a cop on video says 'I'll kill you.' Wednesday, April 8.

item.title: Ramesh Sees It Differently – April 8, 2026
item.description: Ramesh on the US$761M oil windfall, the St Kitts agreements, and why the gas project is right on track, actually.
